_source: Transcribed (no new API calls) from Claude_OS/project ideas/statistics-calculator-seo-study/ maps 08-13. Every keyword is a real study keyword. Pure-tool-intent keywords (e.g. 'X calculator') are kept OFF article lists and live on calculators.tool_keyword instead (cannibalization guard). Dedup decision: 'distribution mean' appeared on both A2 and PD2 in the source; assigned to PD2 (mean of a distribution).

categories.title: Descriptive Statistics
categories.description: Core summaries for describing datasets: center, spread, and shape.

categories.title: Probability & Distributions
categories.description: The rules of chance and the named distributions they generate.

categories.title: Regression & Correlation
categories.description: Relationships between variables: correlation, causation, and regression.

categories.title: Foundations Hub
categories.description: What statistics is, notation, parameters vs statistics, and proportions.

categories.title: Inferential & Hypothesis Testing
categories.description: Z-scores, p-values, hypothesis tests, t-tests, and chi-square.

articles.title: How to Find the Mean (Average): Formula & Steps
keywords: how to find the average of numbers
how to find the mean in math
how do i find an average

articles.title: What Is an Average? Mean Definition, Types & Meaning
articles.notes: 'distribution mean' moved to PD2 (dedup).

articles.title: Mean vs Average - Are They the Same Thing?
keywords: is the mean the same as average
is mean the same as average
is average and mean the same
is average the same as mean
mean is the same as average
is the mean the same as the average

articles.title: Weighted Average: Formula & Calculator
How to Find the Median: Formula & Steps
Median vs Average & What "Median" Means
keywords: what does median mean in math

articles.title: Mean, Median, Mode & Range: The Complete Guide
keywords: how to find mean median and mode
how to calculate mean median and mode
how to find mode in math
what does mode mean in math

articles.title: Standard Deviation: Meaning, Formula & How to Calculate
articles.notes: Category pillar / head term. An MDX stub already exists.
keywords: how to find the standard deviation

articles.title: The Standard Deviation Symbol (Sigma): Signs & Notation
articles.notes: Big low-KD win.
keywords: which of the following symbols identifies the population standard deviation

articles.title: How to Calculate Standard Deviation in Excel
Variance: Definition, Formula & vs Standard Deviation
Sample Variance Formula Explained
keywords: formula for variance of a sample

articles.title: Mean Absolute Deviation & Coefficient of Variation
keywords: using mean and mean absolute deviation to compare data iready

articles.title: How to Find the Range in Statistics
keywords: how do you find the range
how do you calculate the range
how do you find range in a data set
how to find the range of a data set

articles.title: How to Find Outliers: The 1.5xIQR Rule & Formula
keywords: how to find an outlier in statistics

articles.title: Interquartile Range (IQR): Formula & How to Find It
keywords: how to find the interquartile range

articles.title: Percentiles: Meaning, Definition & How to Calculate
Frequency Tables: How to Build & Read Them
articles.notes: Frequency silo pillar, KD 1 - build early.
keywords: what is the relative frequency in statistics

articles.title: Range of a Function in Statistics: How to Find It
articles.primary_keyword: range of a function in statistics
articles.notes: Unflagged + re-scoped 2026-07-11: original keyword set was algebra (function domain/range) intent (dropped 2 phrasings: graph range, piecewise function range). Primary keyword extended to "range of a function in statistics" and slug suffixed -statistics to disambiguate from the algebra term. KD/volume nulled -- needs fresh keyword research.
keywords: range of a function in statistics

articles.title: How to Find Frequency in Statistics
articles.primary_keyword: how to find frequency in statistics
articles.notes: Unflagged + re-scoped 2026-07-11: original keyword set was 100% wave/wavelength physics intent (dropped 11 phrasings). Primary keyword extended to "how to find frequency in statistics" and slug suffixed -statistics to disambiguate from the physics term. KD/volume nulled -- old figures were driven by the dropped physics keywords and no longer apply; needs fresh keyword research before a KD-based priority is trusted.
keywords: how to find frequency in statistics

articles.title: Probability: Formula, Conditional Probability & Expected Value
articles.notes: Consolidated probability pillar; probability side is keyword-thin (dedicated research candidate).

articles.title: Probability Distributions Explained: Types, Mean & Examples
articles.notes: Overview/hub; owns 'distribution mean' (moved from A2).

articles.title: Normal Distribution: The Bell Curve Explained
articles.notes: Head pillar; 'standard gaussian distribution' relocated in from Stage 5.

articles.title: Z-Table: The Standard Normal Distribution Table (How to Read It)
articles.notes: Biggest low-KD win in the category. z-table lookup (vs z-score on I1).

articles.title: Binomial Distribution: Formula, Examples & How to Use It
Skewed Distributions: Left Skew, Right Skew & Distribution Shape
articles.notes: Very low KD, diagram-led.

articles.title: Continuous Distributions: Exponential, Uniform, Gamma & Lognormal
Correlation Coefficient (r): Formula & How to Interpret r Values
articles.notes: Category pillar; absorbs the KD-0 r-value interpretation quizzes.
keywords: which value of r indicates a stronger correlation
which of the following r values represents the strongest correlation
which of the following r-values represents the strongest correlation
which of these r-values represents the weakest correlation
which of these r values represents the weakest correlation

articles.title: Pearson Correlation Coefficient: Formula, Covariance & Spearman
articles.notes: Shares the RC1 correlation tool.

articles.title: What Is Correlation? Definition, Positive vs Negative & Types
articles.notes: Plain-language entry; scatter-plot demo (not a calc embed).
keywords: which table shows a positive correlation

articles.title: Correlation vs Causation: Why Correlation Doesn't Imply Causation
articles.notes: Phase-1 mega-win: 'which correlation is most likely a causation' 49.5k/KD0.
keywords: which correlation is most likely a causation
true or false correlation implies causation
true or false: correlation implies causation

articles.title: Linear Regression: Equation, Formula & How It Works
articles.notes: Head term KD47 with KD-0/KD-9 easy entries; logistic regression folded in.
keywords: which regression equation best fits these data
which regression equation best fits the data

articles.title: Regression to the Mean: Definition & Real-World Examples
articles.notes: FLAGGED thin (4 KWs). Recommend standalone (distinct intent from regression analysis). Unflagged 2026-07-11: no keyword/intent issue found, cleared for publishing as-is.

articles.title: Z-Score: Formula, How to Calculate & What It Means
articles.notes: z-score (statistic); z-table lookup lives on PD4.

articles.title: P-Value: What It Is & How to Calculate It
keywords: what is p value in statistics

articles.title: Null Hypothesis: Definition, Examples & How to State It
articles.notes: FLAGGED intent caution: the four 'what does null mean' variants are ambiguous (programming null). Lead with stats framing + disambiguation line.

articles.title: Test Statistic: Formula, Critical Values, Degrees of Freedom & the t-Table
articles.notes: Dense Phase-1 cluster; 3 df-definitional variants relocated in from Stage 5.
keywords: how to find degrees of freedom
what is a degree of freedom in statistics
what is d f in statistics

articles.title: T-Test: Formula, Paired & Two-Sample T-Tests Explained
articles.notes: Mann-Whitney lives on I9, not here. Comparison phrasings ('t-test and paired t-test' / 't test and paired t test') reassigned to paired-vs-independent-t-test per Phase-2 brief T16 routing guard.

articles.title: Chi-Square Test: Formula, Equation & How to Use It
articles.notes: All spelling variants consolidated; distribution side -> I7.

articles.title: Chi-Square Distribution: Shape, Table & Probability Density
articles.notes: Shares I6 chi-square engine; distribution/table half.

articles.title: Confidence Interval: Formula & How to Calculate a 95% CI
articles.notes: FLAGGED thin (3 KWs). Rich topic; flag for a dedicated KW pass (margin of error, confidence level, sample size). Unflagged 2026-07-11: no keyword/intent issue found, cleared for publishing as-is.

articles.title: Fundamental Statistics: What Statistics Is & Why It Matters
articles.notes: Flagship '2nd homepage' (fundamental statistics 301k/KD7). Links out to every category.

articles.title: Parameter vs Statistic: Definitions, Symbols & How to Tell Them Apart
articles.notes: Clean KD 0-8 sweep of nine variants.

articles.title: Statistics Symbols Cheat Sheet
articles.notes: FLAGGED thin (3 KWs) but KD 0-1. Home for the ~40-entry symbol glossary - substance is fine. Unflagged + rebranded 2026-07-11: reframed as a "cheat sheet" reference page, slug/title updated to match; underlying keywords were already statistics-scoped so KD/volume left as-is.

articles.title: Proportions in Statistics: Meaning, Formula & How to Solve Them
articles.notes: Unflagged + re-scoped 2026-07-11: dropped 2 pure-algebra phrasings ("indirect proportion", homework-style "what value of x..." query) that do not read as statistics intent even extended. Remaining keywords extended with "in statistics". Slug/title already statistics-scoped, left unchanged. KD/volume nulled -- needs fresh keyword research.

articles.title: Validity in Research: Construct, Internal & External Validity Explained
articles.notes: STUB / research_pending: only 2 KWs. Do NOT build until a research-methods keyword pass (validity types, reliability, bias, design) expands it.

articles.title: Types of Variables: Qualitative vs. Quantitative
articles.notes: Phase-2 batch (brief #1/B07). Highest single-keyword volume in the study batch. Do not re-attach Mann-Whitney/Kruskal-Wallis phrasings (reassigned to T14/T15).

articles.title: Binomial Theorem & Binomial Coefficient Explained
articles.notes: Phase-2 batch (brief #2/T22). Reassigned from B03 pull. Must disambiguate vs binomial-distribution (do not merge). Links to /combinations/ (required guard).

articles.title: Central Limit Theorem: Definition & Examples
articles.notes: Phase-2 batch (brief #3/T08). Single strong head term, no supporting long-tail found after two research rounds.

articles.title: Permutations: Formula & Examples
articles.notes: Phase-2 batch (brief #4/T20). No 'with/without repetition' split (zero volume, locked decision). Required cross-links: T19, T21, H01, /combinatorics/.

articles.title: Combinations: Formula & Examples
articles.notes: Phase-2 batch (brief #5/T21). Only confirmed term is 'combination formula'. Required cross-links: T19, T20, H01, /combinatorics/.

articles.title: Type I and Type II Errors Explained
articles.primary_keyword: type i and type ii errors
articles.notes: Phase-2 batch (brief #6/T04).
keywords: type i and type ii errors
type i vs type ii errors

articles.title: Bayes' Theorem (Bayes' Rule): Formula & Examples
articles.notes: Phase-2 batch (brief #7/T18). Do not target 'bayesian statistics' or 'conditional probability formula' (owned by probability-distribution / probability-formula). No third re-seed recommended.

articles.title: Levels of Measurement: Nominal, Ordinal, Interval & Ratio
articles.notes: Phase-2 batch (brief #8/T13). Strongest topic in the batch by keyword count; cluster of ~13 'nominal ordinal interval ratio' variants at ~6600/KD19-34, only one example figure confirmed -- do not invent the rest.

articles.title: Mann-Whitney U Test: Formula & When to Use It
articles.notes: Phase-2 batch (brief #9/T14). Reassigned from T11/T17/B07 leaks. Splits the retired 'non-parametric-tests' stub together with T15 -- do not link a non-parametric-tests page. Required cross-link: /kruskal-wallis-test/.
keywords: mann-whitney u test wilcoxon rank sum

articles.title: R-Squared & Adjusted R-Squared Explained
articles.notes: Phase-2 batch (brief #10/B06). Zero signal for bare 'r-squared'/'adjusted r-squared' in both research rounds -- SEO emphasis should prioritize 'coefficient of determination', title keeps 'R-Squared' for readability.

articles.title: Reliability in Statistics: Cronbach's Alpha & Cohen's Kappa
articles.notes: Phase-2 batch (brief #11/B05). Two distinct subtopics (internal consistency vs inter-rater agreement) -- keep clearly separated, do not blend formulas. Companion to validity-in-statistics stub.

articles.title: Effect Size: What It Means & How to Interpret It
articles.notes: Phase-2 batch (brief #12/T06). Keyword set fixed on re-seed -- use only these three figures.

articles.title: Kruskal-Wallis Test: Formula & When to Use It
articles.notes: Phase-2 batch (brief #13/T15). Reassigned from B07 leak. Splits the retired 'non-parametric-tests' stub together with T14. Required cross-links: /one-way-anova/, /mann-whitney-u-test/. Despite 'analysis of variance' in the phrase, do NOT let it bleed into one-way-anova content.
keywords: kruskal wallis one way analysis of variance

articles.title: Paired vs. Independent T-Test: Which One Do You Need?
articles.notes: Phase-2 batch (brief #14/T16). Do not target bare 'paired t-test' (belongs to the existing planned t-test article).
keywords: t test and paired t test

articles.title: The Empirical Rule (68-95-99.7 Rule) Explained
articles.notes: Phase-2 batch (brief #15/B01). Thinnest keyword-validated topic in the batch -- single confirmed term, do not pad. Required link: normal-distribution.

articles.title: Permutations vs. Combinations: What's the Difference?
articles.notes: Phase-2 batch (brief #16/H01). Graduated from research_pending stub: confirmed zero-volume structural hub by design (file 18 sec4), not a research gap anymore. Must link down to all 4 spokes: fundamental-counting-principle, permutations, combinations, binomial-theorem.

articles.title: The Fundamental Counting Principle Explained
articles.notes: Phase-2 batch (brief #17/T19). Topical-authority write, no confirmed keyword data. Cluster's conceptual prerequisite -- links up to H01 and forward to permutations/combinations.

articles.title: One-Way ANOVA: When and How to Use It
articles.notes: Phase-2 batch (brief #18/T01). Zero keyword signal across two seeding rounds (T01/T02/T03/T05 group). Required: cross-link to kruskal-wallis-test as non-parametric analogue; do not use 'kruskal wallis analysis of variance' phrasing here.

articles.title: Two-Way ANOVA: Testing Multiple Factors
articles.notes: Phase-2 batch (brief #19/T02). Zero keyword signal (T01/T02/T03/T05 group).

articles.title: Post-Hoc Tests: Tukey, Bonferroni & When to Use Them
articles.notes: Phase-2 batch (brief #20/T03). Zero keyword signal (T01/T02/T03/T05 group). Frame as the necessary follow-up to a significant ANOVA, not a standalone alternative.

articles.title: Statistical Power: What It Means and How to Calculate It
articles.notes: Phase-2 batch (brief #21/T05). Zero keyword signal (T01/T02/T03/T05 group).

articles.title: Which Statistical Test Should You Use? A Decision Guide
articles.primary_keyword: which statistical test should i use
articles.notes: Phase-2 batch (brief #22/B08). Structural wayfinding page, no cannibalization risk. Should link to every named test article once they exist.

articles.title: F-Test and F-Distribution Explained
articles.notes: Phase-2 batch (brief #23/T07). Scope narrowed to F-test/F-distribution only -- chi-square-distribution and t-distribution content stays out (hard scope guard).

articles.title: Sampling Distributions: What They Are and Why They Matter
articles.notes: Phase-2 batch (brief #24/T09). Scoped to sampling distribution of the mean/proportion only -- general population-distribution content belongs to the published probability-distribution article (hard guard). Do not use chi-square-distribution phrasings.

articles.title: Poisson Distribution: Formula & Examples
articles.notes: Phase-2 batch (brief #25/T10). No confirmed keyword data. Brief names a Poisson calculator embed (suite 6) but no 'poisson' slug exists in calculators yet -- flag as a build gap before assuming an embed.

articles.title: Independent, Dependent & Mutually Exclusive Events
articles.notes: Phase-2 batch (brief #26/B02). Core teaching point: mutually exclusive is NOT the same as independent (must stay explicit).

articles.title: Hypergeometric Distribution: Formula & Examples
articles.notes: Phase-2 batch (brief #27/B03). Do not re-attach 'binomial theorem'/'pascal's triangle' keywords (reassigned to T22).

articles.title: Linear Regression Assumptions Explained
articles.notes: Phase-2 batch (brief #28/T11). Multicollinearity subsection should hand off to multicollinearity-vif, not duplicate it.

articles.title: Multicollinearity & Variance Inflation Factor (VIF) Explained
articles.notes: Phase-2 batch (brief #29/T12). Do not assume a VIF calculator exists -- suite 7 is documented as simple/bivariate only.

articles.title: Simpson's Paradox: What It Is and Why It Happens
articles.notes: Phase-2 batch (brief #30/B04). Two independent seed rounds returned only noise (TV-show contamination) -- no real keyword data, do not fabricate figures. Companion to correlation-vs-causation.
